d:
When a battle starts, Isabella selects the [[frontmost]] allied hero as her companion. If the companion is defeated, Isabella will select a new one. Whenever the companion receives a stat boost to ATK, ATK SPD, Haste, Phys DEF, Magic DEF, or Vitality, Isabella gains a permanent stack of spell note corresponding to that stat. Each type of spell note can stack up to 3 times. Note that stat boosts granted by Isabella's spell notes themselves do not trigger additional stacks of spell notes.
When Isabella casts her Ultimate, she increases her companion's ATK by [[15%]] and their Haste by [[15]] for [[6]]s. Additionally, each spell note stack Isabella carries will increase the companion's corresponding stat:
ATK, Phys DEF, and Magic DEF: +[[15%]] per stack.
ATK SPD, Haste, and Vitality: +[[15]] per stack.
When Isabella uses her Ultimate, the buffs she grants to her companion last [[6.5]]s.
When Isabella uses her Ultimate, the buffs she grants to her companion last [[7]]s.
When Isabella uses her Ultimate, the buffs she grants to her companion last [[7.5]]s.
When Isabella uses her Ultimate, the buffs she grants to her companion last [[8]]s.

Isabella targets only her companion with this skill, healing them for [[340%]]<ATK> HP and then dealing [[150%]]<ATK> damage to enemies adjacent to her companion. [[100%]] of the damage dealt is also converted into extra healing for her companion.
Increases the amount of direct healing to [[360%]]<ATK>.
Increases the amount of direct healing to [[380%]]<ATK>.
Increases the amount of direct healing to [[400%]]<ATK>.

After her companion is affected by control effects for [[5]]s, Isabella can make them unaffected for [[2.5]]s. This effect can only trigger once every [[5]]s.
Additionally, when an enemy hero deals [[350%]]<ATK> damage to her companion, Isabella reduces that enemy's ATK by [[60%]]<ATK> for [[5]]s. This effect can only trigger once every [[5]]s.
Increases the ATK reduction inflicted by Isabella to [[65%]]<ATK>.
Increases the ATK reduction inflicted by Isabella to [[70%]]<ATK>.
Increases the ATK reduction inflicted by Isabella to [[75%]]<ATK>.
Increases Assistance by [[30]] during battle.
Increases Assistance by [[40]] during battle.
Increases Assistance by [[50]] during battle.

When Isabella casts her Ultimate, she also debuffs the enemy hero who has dealt the most damage to her companion, temporarily reducing the stats linked to active spell note stacks from Isabella's Ultimate. The debuffs last [[8]]s and are [[80%]] as effective as the corresponding buffs from spell note stacks.
Increases debuff effectiveness to [[90%]] of the original buff value.

When a buff from Isabella's Ultimate expires, she recovers [[180]] Energy for every spell note type at maximum stacks. Each time Isabella casts her Ultimate, she can recover up to [[540]] Energy this way.
Increases debuff effectiveness to [[100%]] of the original buff value.

r.d: In Rivalry Mode, the first ally to drop below [[40%]] HP is healed for [[160%]]<ATK> HP and granted a shield equal to [[160%]]<ATK>.
Lvl. 4 Refinement: In Rivalry Mode, increases 10 Haste, 25 Assistance.

d: Whenever Isabella's companion receives a buff that increases their ATK, Phys DEF, or Magic DEF by at least [[15%]], or increases their ATK SPD, Haste, or Vitality by at least [[15]], Isabella gains an extra stack of the corresponding spell note.
